ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "zestimate_amount" REAL /* Estimated market value of the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "home_size" INTEGER /* Total size of the property in square feet */,
  "home_type" TEXT /* Type of home (e.g., Apartment, Condominium) */,
  "property_address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood where the property is located */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_sold_date" TEXT /* Date the property was last sold */,
  "last_sold_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was last sold */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "property_photos" TEXT /* URLs or paths to property photos */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_stats" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime record */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "murder_non_negligent_manslaughter" REAL /* Number of murder and non-negligent manslaughter incidents */,
  "rape" REAL /* Number of rape incidents */,
  "robbery" REAL /* Number of robbery incidents */,
  "total_felonies" INTEGER /* Total number of major felony offenses */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the crime statistics */,
  "total_crimes" INTEGER /* Total number of crimes (not just felonies) */,
  "property_crimes" INTEGER /* Number of property crimes */,
  "violent_crimes" INTEGER /* Number of violent crimes */,
  "crime_description" TEXT /* Detailed description or notes about the crime statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school record */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the school is located */,
  "number_tested" INTEGER /* Number of students tested in assessments */,
  "mean_score" REAL /* Mean score of the students from assessments */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_address" TEXT /* Full address of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., public, private) */,
  "school_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "home_types" (
  "home_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each home type */,
  "home_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the home type (e.g. Apartment, Cooperative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("home_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighborhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the neighborhood is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the neighborhood */,
  "average_home_price" REAL /* Average home price in the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the real estate agent */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address for the agent */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency the agent belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the agent */,
  "office_address" TEXT /* Address of the agent's office */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the agent has been in the real estate business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the real estate agency */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the agency */,
  "office_address" TEXT /* Address of the agency's main office */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the agency's website */,
  "number_of_agents" INTEGER /* Number of agents employed by the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents_properties" (
  "agent_property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association record */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent representing the property */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being represented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_properties_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_properties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_crime_stats" (
  "neighborhood_crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood-crime record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime statistics record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhood_crime_stats_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_school_stats" (
  "property_school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property-school record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_school_stats_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_school_stats_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_by_neighborhood" (
  "crime_by_neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yearly crime record for a neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the crime data */,
  "murder_count" REAL /* Count of murders in the year */,
  "rape_count" REAL /* Count of rapes in the year */,
  "robbery_count" REAL /* Count of robberies in the year */,
  "property_crimes_count" INTEGER /* Count of property crimes in the year */,
  "violent_crimes_count" INTEGER /* Count of violent crimes in the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_by_neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_by_neighborhood_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, agent, client) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
